title: Incorrect result from LEFT JOIN query
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, value VARCHAR);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, value INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM t1 AS a LEFT JOIN t2 AS b ON b.id BETWEEN 5 AND 15 JOIN t1 AS c ON (c.id = a.id OR b.id IS NOT NULL AND c.id = b.id);
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with BETWEEN condition returning zero rows
